build.buildCommand: mkdir -p data && apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq tippecanoe python3-pip && curl -sL --fail -o /tmp/pmtiles.tar.gz https://github.com/protomaps/go-pmtiles/releases/download/v1.31.0/go-pmtiles_1.31.0_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz && tar xzf /tmp/pmtiles.tar.gz -C /usr/local/bin pmtiles && test -x /usr/local/bin/pmtiles && rm /tmp/pmtiles.tar.gz && npm install && curl -sL -o data/indicadores.gpkg "${GPKG_URL:-https://github.com/bitsandbricks/NIDO_app/releases/download/v1/indicadores.gpkg}" && python3 -m pip install -q --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt && python3 scripts/prepare_data.py && npm run build
